Simple Process

Booking Your Perfect Tour is Easy

From discovering amazing destinations to receiving your digital ticket, we've made the entire process seamless and straightforward.

01

Discover Tours

Browse through hundreds of amazing tours across Ethiopia. View photos, read descriptions, and see available trip options by category.

250+ tour destinations
Detailed descriptions
Photo galleries
Category filters
02

Choose Your Trip

Select your preferred trip type, date, and travel provider. Choose from group trips, private tours, or special holiday packages.

Group & private trips
Flexible dates
Multiple providers
Price comparison
03

Select Pickup Point

Choose a convenient pickup station near you. View pickup times and any additional costs for each location.

City-wide stations
Clear pickup times
Easy navigation
No hidden fees
04

Secure Payment

Pay securely using your preferred method. We support Chapa, Telebirr, and other popular Ethiopian payment options.

Multiple payment options
Secure transactions
Instant confirmation
Digital receipt
05

Get Your Ticket

Receive your digital QR ticket instantly. Simply show it to the driver on the day of your trip. No printing needed!

Digital QR ticket
Trip details
Driver contact
Easy check-in
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a trip?

Simply download the Tankua app, browse tours by category, select your trip, choose a pickup station, and pay securely. You'll receive your digital ticket instantly.

What payment methods are accepted?

We accept Chapa, Telebirr, CBE Birr, and Amole. More payment options are being added regularly.

Can I cancel my booking?

Yes! Full refund if cancelled 48+ hours before the trip, 50% refund for 24-48 hours, and no refund within 24 hours.

How do I find my pickup station?

The app shows all pickup stations on a map. You can filter by distance and see the exact pickup time for each location.

What if my trip is cancelled?

If a trip is cancelled by the provider, you'll receive a full refund automatically. We'll also notify you immediately and help you book an alternative.

Ready to Start Your Journey?

Download Tankua today and book your first tour to one of Ethiopia's amazing destinations.
